options.name: -clock
options.description: Specifies a set of clocks to report min_pulse_width

options.name: -net
options.description: Adds a row for the net arc

options.name: -path_type
options.description: Specifies the type of report to generate

options.name: -pins
options.description: Specifies a set of ports and pins on the clock network

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Detailed information about minimum pulse width calculations

options.name: -waveform_aware_type
options.description: Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file
